project.name: 赛博朋克博客
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Dark cyberpunk minimalism inspired by Lucy from Cyberpunk: Edge Runners — deep dark backgrounds with neon cyan accents, clean grid layouts, subtle scanline textures, monospace code accents, restrained and cold aesthetic
project.designRead: personal tech blog / developer & tech enthusiasts / cold minimal cyberpunk / low-medium density / avoid purple neon and over-saturated gradients

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: neon cyan (#00f0ff) for accents, links, and interactive highlights on dark backgrounds
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single primary hue only; categories and tags use neutral tints

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: sharp corners (2-6px radius), minimal rounding, rectangular cards with thin borders
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter + Noto Sans SC for display/body; JetBrains Mono for code and technical accents
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base grid, generous whitespace (8-24rem sections), airy content blocks
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: thin-bordered cards, monospace labels, gradient accent lines, grid overlays
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first surfaces (no shadows for static cards), glow effects only for active/hover states
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: dark atmospheric imagery, cyan-tinted photos, minimal icon usage
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle cyan glow on hover, fast transitions, minimal animation

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: fixed top nav bar with logo left + nav links center/right, transparent bg with bottom gradient line, active link in cyan
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single neon cyan hue for all primary interactive elements
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Inter + Noto Sans SC, JetBrains Mono for code
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-first surfaces, glow on hover/focus only
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: filled cyan buttons with dark text, thin-bordered secondary buttons, monospace labels
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content, centered hero text, consistent 8rem section padding

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Dark mode with neon cyan accent, sharp corners, Inter font family, border-first surfaces

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: Blog homepage with hero section and featured article grid
pages.visualNorthStar: A dark, atmospheric blog landing with a neon cyan accent line cutting through the hero, crisp monospace category labels, and a clean card grid for posts — feels like Lucy's interface, not a generic template
pages.compositionPattern: Hero statement + segmented content grid with sidebar
continuityAnchors: top nav bar with cyan accent

pages.title: 文章详情
pages.businessScenario: Individual blog article with clean reading experience
pages.visualNorthStar: A focused, distraction-free reading page with wide content area, subtle monospace metadata, and a thin cyan accent on the article header — elegant tech documentation meets cyberpunk minimalism
continuityAnchors: top nav bar with cyan accent

pages.title: 关于
pages.businessScenario: Personal introduction page with bio, skills, and contact
pages.visualNorthStar: A sleek personal page with a monospace terminal-style intro, tech stack displayed as minimalist tags, and a subtle grid overlay background — feels like a cyberpunk character profile
continuityAnchors: top nav bar with cyan accent

assets.semanticDescription: Dark atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape with neon cyan glow, abstract and minimal, suitable as hero background for a tech blog
